Notes: Single UPDATE contains add_rr and delete_rrset for the same owner/type, with no prerequisites, to probe whether the server applies operations sequentially or as a net effect.

Steps.Description: Add host2.campus.edu. A and delete the host2.campus.edu. A RRset in the same UPDATE message, with no prerequisites.

Steps.Name: host2.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A RRset exists after the transaction.
